title: Crystalline forms of tapinarof
abstract: The present invention relates to Tapinarof dimethylacetamide solvate and crystalline forms thereof, processes for preparation and pharmaceutical compositions thereof. Furthermore, the invention concerns its use for the preparation of a medicament, preferably for the treatment of skin diseases.
claims:
Claims 1) A Tapinarof dimethylacetamide solvate. 2) A dimethylacetamide solvate according Claim 1 , which is characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: (i) an X-ray powder diffraction pattern substantially as depicted in Figure 1 ; (ii) an X-ray powder diffraction pattern having peaks at 8.3, 15.1 , 17.1 , 21.7, and 29.5 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; (iii) a DSC curve substantially as depicted in Figure 2; (iv) a TGA curve substantially as depicted in Figure 3; or any combination of (i)-(iv) . 3) A dimethylacetamide solvate according Claim 1 , which is characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: (i) an X-ray powder diffraction pattern substantially as depicted in Figure 4; (ii) an X-ray powder diffraction pattern having peaks at 6.4, 6.7, 13.5, 17.9, and 22.4 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; (iii) a DSC curve substantially as depicted in Figure 5; (iv) a TGA curve substantially as depicted in Figure 6; or any combination of (i)-(iv) . 4) A process for the preparation of the dimethylacetamide solvate according to Claim 2 comprising: (i) dissolving Tapinarof in DMA at a temperature in a range of from 30 Â°C to 50 Â°C; (ii) adding an anti-solvent selected from aliphatic and aromatic hydrocarbons, optionally in more than one portion; (iii) stirring the slurry at a temperature in the range from about 10 Â°C to 50Â°C; (iv) isolating at least a part of the crystals of dimethylacetamide solvate according Claim 2 from its mother liquor; (v) optionally washing the isolated crystals of dimethylacetamide solvate according Claim 2 with a solvent; (vi) optionally drying the isolated crystals obtained in (iv). 

5) A process for the preparation of the dimethylacetamide solvate according to Claim 3 comprising: (i) dispersing Tapinarof dimethylacetamide solvate according Claim 2 in water; (ii) stirring the slurry at a temperature in the range of from about 0 Â°C to 50 Â°C; (iii) isolating at least a part of the crystals of the dimethylacetamide solvate according Claim 3 from its mother liquor; (iv) optionally washing the isolated crystals of the dimethylacetamide solvate according Claim 3 with a solvent; (v) optionally drying the isolated crystals obtained in (iii). 6) A pharmaceutical composition comprising a therapeutically effective amount of the dimethylacetamide solvate according to Claim 3 and at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 7) The pharmaceutical composition according to Claim 6, wherein the dimethylacetamide solvate according to Claim 3 is prepared from the dimethylacetamide solvate according to Claim 2. 8) The pharmaceutical composition according to Claims 6 or 7, wherein the pharmaceutical composition is in a topical dosage form. 9) A pharmaceutical composition according to Claim 8, wherein the topical dosage form is a cream. 10) Use of the dimethylacetamide solvate according to Claim 2 for the preparation of the dimethylacetamide solvate according to Claim 3. 11 ) A dimethylacetamide solvate according to any one of Claims 1 to 3 or a pharmaceutical composition according to any one of Claims 6 to 9 for use as medicament. 12) A pharmaceutical composition according to any one of Claims 6 to 9 for use in a method for the treatment of a skin disease. 13) A pharmaceutical composition for use according to Claim 12, wherein the skin disease is selected from atopic dermatitis and psoriasis. 14) A pharmaceutical composition for use according to Claim 12 or 13, wherein the method for the treatment comprises topically administering the pharmaceutical composition to a subject suffering from said disorder, or otherwise in need of the treatment.
